singleReact.name: Single Agent (Autonomous Planning Mode)
singleReact.description: An agent built on large model autonomous planning and reflection, intelligent orchestration, and tool invocation, suitable for scenarios relying on complex task planning and deep analysis execution.

multiWorkflow.name: Single Agent (Multi-Workflow Mode)
multiWorkflow.description: Orchestrate agents through workflows, suitable for scenarios with clear and definite business solution steps.

name.label: Agent Name
name.placeholder: Enter your agent name, e.g., Product Expert. The name cannot be modified after creation.

description.label: Agent Description
description.placeholder: Describe the agent's capabilities in one sentence, e.g., Answer product questions

messages.updateAgentFailed: Update failed, please try again later

publishNotice.title: Publishing Notice
publishNotice.description: Note: In this version, published agents do not support invoking knowledge bases or memories. Workflows do not support Code, Input/Output, or Questioner components. Plugins do not support code plugins.

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt Configuration
systemPrompt.defineAgentPlaceholder: Define the agent's role, capabilities, and behavioral guidelines...

generationBanner.generated: System prompt generated (you can preview and decide whether to apply it).

overwritePromptTemplateDialog.description: This operation will overwrite the prompt template draft. Please choose your preferred handling method.
overwritePromptTemplateDialog.overwriteAndJump: Overwrite: Overwrite the prompt editing page with the current agent's system prompt content
overwritePromptTemplateDialog.notOverwriteAndJump: Don't Overwrite: Keep the original content of the prompt editing page unchanged

agentAssociatePromptDialog.title: Prompt Library
agentAssociatePromptDialog.selectPrompt: Please select a prompt on the left

fields.promptKeyHelperExisting: A prompt is already associated, key cannot be modified
fields.promptKeyHelperInvalid: Only letters, numbers, underscores (_) and hyphens (-) are allowed, and it must start with a letter
fields.promptNameHelperExisting: A prompt is already associated, name cannot be modified
fields.versionHelperMustGreaterExisting: Version must be greater than existing version {{latestVersion}}
fields.versionHelperFormatAndGreater: Must be in x.x.x format and greater than current latest version {{latestVersion}}

messages.emptySystemPrompt: System prompt is empty and cannot be generated.
messages.emptySystemPromptCannotSave: System prompt is empty and cannot be saved.
messages.modelIdNotFound: No matching model ID found, using default value.
messages.generateComplete: System prompt has been generated. You can review and apply it.
messages.adopted: The auto-generated system prompt has been applied.
messages.cancelled: Auto-generated result cancelled. Original prompt restored.
messages.prefillFailed: Failed to prefill prompt information. Please try again later.
messages.fillKeyNameVersion: Please fill in prompt key, name and version.
messages.versionFormatAndGreaterError: Version must be in x.x.x format and greater than the existing version.
messages.savedAndCommitted: Prompt has been saved and version committed.
messages.savePromptFailed: Failed to save prompt. Please try again later.

unlinkDialog.title: Unlink Prompt
unlinkDialog.message: Are you sure you want to unlink prompt "{{promptName}}-{{version}}" from this agent? This action cannot be undone.

alerts.noWorkflow: No workflows yet. Click the button above to add a workflow.
alerts.modelDisabledMessage: The associated model "{{name}}" is disabled. Please select another available model or go to the model management page to enable it.
alerts.noModelsConfiguredMessage: No models are configured. Please go to the model configuration page to add models.

workflow.validationWarning: Some workflows have validation errors ({{count}}). Please open the corresponding workflow to fix.

list.empty: No knowledge bases added yet. Click the button above to add.

removeDialog.title: Remove Knowledge Base
removeDialog.message: Are you sure you want to remove this knowledge base? This action cannot be undone.

knowledgeSettings.title: Knowledge Base Settings
knowledgeSettings.graphStrategyTooltip: Choose how to use document graph enhancement. Only available when the knowledge base has graph-enhanced documents.
knowledgeSettings.baseTooltip: Uses entity and relation graphs for reasoning, good for complex cross-paragraph and cross-document questions with more logical answers.
knowledgeSettings.agenticTooltip: Retrieval agent decides and runs multi-step queries automatically, suitable for open-ended or multi-step reasoning with better accuracy and flexibility.
knowledgeSettings.noGraphDocsMessage: No graph-enhanced documents in this knowledge base. Document graph retrieval is unavailable.
knowledgeSettings.maxRecallTooltip: Maximum number of passages returned from knowledge to the model. Higher values return more content.
knowledgeSettings.minScoreTooltip: Only passages with similarity score above this value are returned in vector retrieval.
knowledgeSettings.minScoreWarning: A minimum score of 1.0 may exclude all results, as few passages match exactly.

memoryBase.title: Memory Base
memoryBase.needBind: Need to bind a memory base
memoryBase.variable: Please bind a memory base to enable memory variable feature
memoryBase.longTerm: Please bind a memory base to enable long-term memory feature
memoryBase.noMemoryBase: No memory base added, memory configuration will not take effect. Click the top-right corner to add a memory base.

memory.longTermDescription: When enabled, the agent can remember key information from the conversation history.
memory.userProfileDescription: When enabled, the agent can remember user profile information from the conversation history.
memory.semanticMemoryDescription: When enabled, the agent can use semantic analysis to understand and remember user conversation content.
memory.episodicMemoryDescription: When enabled, the agent can remember specific scenarios and contexts of user conversations.
memory.summaryMemoryDescription: When enabled, the agent can summarize the conversation history.

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.tooltip: Temperature: controls the randomness and creativity of model outputs. Higher values produce more random, diverse results; lower values make outputs more deterministic and conservative. Typical range is 0–2, recommended 0.1–1.0. Examples: 0.7 (balanced) and 1.2 (more creative).

topP.label: Top-p
topP.tooltip: Top-p: samples from the smallest set of tokens whose cumulative probability is at least p. Dynamically adjusts candidate count to balance diversity and quality. Typically set to 0.9–0.95. When used together with temperature, it is recommended to adjust only one of them.

list.empty: No plugins added yet. Click the button in the upper right to add.

delete.title: Remove Plugin
delete.message: Are you sure you want to remove this plugin? This action cannot be undone.

workflowList.emptyText: No workflows added yet. Click the button in the upper right to add.
workflowList.validationFailedTooltip: Workflow validation failed. Please go to the corresponding workflow to fix it.

errors.validateFailed: Unable to verify Embedding model for some knowledge bases
errors.modelMismatch: Selected knowledge bases use different Embedding models: {{modelInfo}}. Please select knowledge bases that use the same Embedding model.

tips.modelDisabledDescription: The current model has been disabled and cannot be used for debugging. Please enable the model in the model management page or select another available model.
